title: Xtra Briny Filipino Deodeok Root Lumpia
description: A Filipino dish featuring deodeok root and lardons, wrapped in a lumpia and cooked in a Dutch oven, perfect for a snack or light meal. This recipe is nut-free friendly and has a briny flavor.
instructions: Preheat the Dutch oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the grated deodeok root, crumbled lardons, fish sauce, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Lay a lumpia wrapper on a flat surface and place about 1 tablespoon of the deodeok root mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with water and fold the wrapper into a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Repeat the process with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Heat the vegetable oil in the preheated Dutch oven and fry the lumpia until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the lumpia from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the Xtra Briny Filipino Deodeok Root Lumpia hot and enjoy.
